title: Allied Systems Network

status.title: Mission Status
status.defaultDesc: Recruit is registered under an allied officer but has not yet completed enlistment requirements.
status.pendingDesc: Recruit has met service time and payment requirements, and is awaiting Fleet Command verification.
status.failedDesc: Recruit did not meet requirements, or allied officer violated federation terms in acquiring the recruit.
status.lockedDesc: Recruit's officer profile is locked and no longer viable.
status.rejectedDesc: Officer profile has permanently failed to meet federation requirements.
status.paidDesc: Allied officer has already received credits for this recruit's enlistment.

faqPage.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqPage.q1: 1. What is the commission structure of the Allied Systems Network?
faqPage.a1: The Galactic Federation pays 100 standard credits flat commission per enlistment — one of the highest-yield allied programs in the known sectors.
faqPage.q2: 2. How long until an enlistment registers in my officer profile?
faqPage.a2: It should register in your profile immediately upon confirmation.
faqPage.q3: 3. I just secured an enlistment. Where can I review it?
faqPage.a3_step2: On the lower starboard panel you will see the option: View Allied Systems Page.
faqPage.a3_step3: Here you can review all pending and approved commissions.
faqPage.q4: 4. I know a crew member who needs orbital hosting. How do I earn a referral fee?
faqPage.a4_step2: Navigate to the lower deck to locate your allied beacon link.
faqPage.a4_step3: Transmit this link to the crew member who requires hosting services.
faqPage.a4_step4: When they traverse that beacon and requisition a service with us, you earn commission credits.
faqPage.q5: 5. I have been approved for the Galactic Federation Allied Systems program. What are my next orders?
faqPage.a5_step1: Authenticate with your allied officer profile to access Federation marketing materials by selecting the Emblems and Beacons module.
faqPage.a5_step2: Select the marketing material you wish to deploy on your platform.
faqPage.a5_step3: Beacon codes appear on the starboard side of all emblems; copy and transmit this code to your platform.
faqPage.a5_step4: When a crew member traverses that beacon and acquires a hosting service, you earn commission credits.
faqPage.q6: 6. Can I engage in warp-speed bidding campaigns to promote the Galactic Federation?
faqPage.a6_line1: Affirmative, but do not bid on our federation name, variations of our federation name, misspellings, or any keyword containing a portion of it including InterServer, InterServer Hosting.
faqPage.a6_line2: Focus bids on keywords such as: fast hosting, PHP hosting, WordPress hosting.
faqPage.a6_line3: Contact Fleet Command if you require assistance identifying effective keyword vectors.
faqPage.a6_line4: Ensure you add InterServer, InterServer Hosting, InterServer.net, InterServer web hosting as negative campaign transponder codes.
faqPage.q7: 7. I have secured an enlistment. When will my commission credits be transferred?
faqPage.a7_line1: After 90 standard days, a valid enlistment will transition from Default status to Awaiting Launch Clearance.
faqPage.a7_line2: Once status is Awaiting Launch Clearance, credits will be transferred during the first 7 days of the standard month.
faqPage.q8: 8. I have a pending enlistment that did not receive credits.
faqPage.a8_line1: There may be several reasons for this. Fleet Command sometimes requires additional time to validate an enlistment.
faqPage.a8_line2: One straightforward check: ensure your credits transfer method is properly configured.
faqPage.q9: 9. How long do enlistments remain pending before approval?
faqPage.q10: 10. Can I use my allied beacon link for self-referrals on officer profiles I intend for personal use?
faqPage.a10: Negative. Any detected connection with a self-referred profile will result in automatic mission failure.
faqPage.a11_intro: Rejected indicates the commission has permanently failed validation.
faqPage.a11_reason1: The recruit has previously enlisted with the Federation.
faqPage.a11_reason2: The same Credit Chip was used across multiple officer profiles.
faqPage.a11_reason3: The system detected that you, the allied officer, are also operating the recruit's profile.
faqPage.a11_policy: Since our commission payout of 100 credits per enlistment often exceeds what we recover from the recruit even after 1 standard year, strict Federation protocols are in place to detect referrals that violate our guidelines. If you are referring a fellow officer or crew member, simply transmit them a beacon link or promo code. Do not share Credit Chips and do not access their profile.
faqPage.a11_reviewTos: Please also review our allied terms here:
faqPage.q12: 12. I am a systems engineer and will refer crew members. Is that permitted?
faqPage.a12_line1: This arrangement will not be compatible with our protocols (or any other hosting allied program). Once matches are detected across multiple officer profiles, commissions are invalidated.
faqPage.a12_line2: This protocol exists to prevent the same officer from enlisting and generating credits from our allied program through self-referral.
faqPage.a12_line3: You may wish to consider hosting crew members directly and billing them yourself using a payment relay. You can acquire a reseller hosting account from us to begin operations.
faqPage.q13: 13. Where can I configure my credits transfer method?
faqPage.a13: You can configure your credits transfer method,
